items.name: Sophie M.
items.text: Impeccable service. My driver was on time at Nice Airport despite a flight delay. Spotless vehicle and a very pleasant ride to Cannes.

items.name: James W.
items.text: I've used Cannes Ride Services during the Film Festival for three consecutive years. Always punctual, discreet, and with impeccable vehicles. Highly recommended.

items.name: Pierre L.
items.text: I rely on Cannes Ride Services for all my trips between Monaco and Cannes. Punctuality and professionalism are always guaranteed.

items.name: Elena R.
items.text: Perfect transfer from Nice Airport for MIPIM. The driver spoke Italian, which made the journey even more enjoyable. Five-star service.

items.name: Marie-Claire D.
items.text: For my clients' weddings, I only trust Cannes Ride Services. Stunning vehicles, formally dressed chauffeurs, perfect coordination.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Excellence in service for your mobility on the French Riviera.
about.story: Founded in Cannes, in the heart of the French Riviera, Cannes Ride Services was born from a passion for exceptional service and quality transport. Since our beginnings, we have accompanied thousands of travelers — professionals, tourists, personalities — with a single goal: to deliver a flawless travel experience, worthy of the prestige of the French Riviera.
about.mission: Our mission is to redefine private transport on the Côte d'Azur. Every ride is a promise: a premium vehicle, a professional and multilingual chauffeur, perfect timing. We don't simply take you from point A to point B — we give you peace of mind.

items.title: Punctuality
items.description: Your time is your most precious asset. We are always there before you, never after. Real-time flight tracking for airport transfers.

items.title: Discretion
items.description: Absolute confidentiality for every journey. Our chauffeurs are trained in the utmost discretion.

items.title: Luxury & Comfort
items.description: Fleet of recent premium Mercedes vehicles, leather interiors, air conditioning, Wi-Fi, and complimentary water on board.

items.title: Multilingual
items.description: Our chauffeurs speak French, English, Arabic, and Italian. Seamless communication with our international clients.

items.name: Mercedes E-Class
items.description: Elegance and comfort for your daily travel and airport transfers.

items.name: Mercedes S-Class
items.description: The pinnacle of automotive luxury. Ideal for prestige events and VIPs.

items.name: Mercedes V-Class
items.description: Spacious and refined, perfect for groups, families, or transfers with luggage.
